REGISTRY = {}
register("default", REGISTRY)


class BaseRecord:
    id = 0
    name = ""


class DataProcessor(BaseRecord):
    def __init__(self):
        self.client = Client()
        self.repo = Repo()
        self.cache = Cache()

    async def run(self):
        return self.render()

    def create(self):
        return {}

    def parse(self):
        return {}

    def save(self):
        return {}

    def render(self):
        return {}
